description_long: This object consists of a small cluster of five mushrooms with pinkish-red, polygonal caps and dark brown, slender stems. The caps are conical and smooth, with subtle faceting that gives them a stylized, geometric appearance. The stems are slightly curved and vary in height, supporting the caps at different levels, creating a natural, organic grouping. The mushrooms are closely packed, with some caps partially overlapping or shadowing others. There are no visible gills or detailed textures beneath the caps, and the overall look is clean and simplified. The coloration is uniform, with the caps being a vibrant pink-red and the stems a deep brown.
description: A cluster of five stylized mushrooms with pink-red, faceted caps and dark brown, slender stems, arranged in a natural grouping.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five mushrooms, with the caps clearly visible and the stems slightly angled.
description_view_1: A more top-down angle, highlighting the largest cap and partially obscuring some of the smaller mushrooms behind it.
description_view_2: Side view with the caps overlapping, revealing the arrangement of stems and the close grouping of the mushrooms.
description_view_3: Rear angle showing the backs of the caps and the tallest mushroom in the center, with stems more visible.
